grant_type.description: Use authorization_code to exchange an authorization code, or refresh_token to refresh an access token.

client_secret.description: The OAuth client secret. Required for confidential clients.

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI used for the authorization request. Required when grant_type is authorization_code.

code.description: The authorization code returned from the authorization redirect. Required when grant_type is authorization_code.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token returned by a previous token response. Required when grant_type is refresh_token.

expires_in.description: Number of seconds until the access token expires.

access_token.description: Bearer token to use in the Authorization header.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token used to obtain a new access token.

completed_at.description: The date when all signatures were completed
